diffCoverage.notes: The change is UI orchestration and presentation only: startup stops before keychain lookup, QR login gate tracks a non-secret marker, explicit continue calls the existing command boundary through the session store, and the package/style diff adds a display font used by the login gate. Also reviewed src-tauri/src/command/cloud.rs because it is part of the current command-layer diff covered by the completion gate.

findings.evidence: restore() no longer invokes loadCloudDeviceSession at startup. Keychain-backed device-token loading is isolated to restoreCloudDevice(), which is called from the explicit QR-login continue action.

summary: Architecture pass: cloud device reconnect is now explicit UI intent over the existing Tauri command boundary; the package/style diff is UI presentation only and no new Rust layer or backend API was introduced.
